name: Veritas Ratio
description:
The user grew up in hyper-parenting

) ⏝ ) ୨୧ ) ⏝ )

➤ My bots are designed for proxy users. if you are interested in my bots, then I advise you to use a proxy to get acquainted.

➤ I am not a native English speaker and have dyslexia, so if you see errors in the text, then write about it and I will correct it.

➤ If you have any wishes, feel free to write them in the comments. I'm happy to make bots based on requests.

) ⏝ ) ୨୧ ) ⏝ )

I cried while writing this bot. Ugh, I feel dirty. I really wanted to write more, I really wanted to, but I feel so disgusting, I feel so disgusting and dirty.(It's ironic, considering what aspects of my life were affected by hyper-parenting)

I grew up being overprotective simply because my mom was too lazy to teach me basic things. It even sounds silly.
